title: Die schwarze Pantherin
writer: Johannes Guter, Hans Janowitz, Volodymyr Vynnychenko
actors: Ivan Bulatov, Eugen Burg, Xenia Desni
plot: Kornej is a young painter of primitivism. An art agent discover the works of Kornej and buy the whole collection. The art critic Moulin is very excited about Kornejs paintings and style. Kornej marries his childhood sweetheart Rita.
